allow: Bash(~/.bun/bin/nano-banana "Wide horizontal promotional banner for FIFA World Cup 2026. Dark navy background gradient from deep black to dark navy blue. Below: JOIN THE PREDICTION CHALLENGE in white text. Gold call-to-action text PREDICT AND WIN. Bottom right corner badge 12BET. Sports broadcast aesthetic, premium dark theme, gold accents, green highlights, cinematic wide format" -s 2K -a 4:1 -o banner -d /tmp/generated-assets/)

Bash(~/.bun/bin/nano-banana "Dark dramatic stadium background with bright spotlights, golden football on left side, shiny FIFA World Cup trophy on right side, large gold metallic bold text FIFA 世界盃 2026 in center, white subtitle text 加入預測挑戰 below title, small rectangular bordered gold button with text 預測贏大獎, 12BET logo in bottom-right corner, professional sports prediction website banner, dark navy background, cinematic lighting" -s 4K -a 4:1 -o banner-zh -d /tmp/generated-assets/ -r /Users/eason.chen/Documents/GitHub/wc-prediction/public/banners/banner-en.png)

Bash(~/.bun/bin/nano-banana "Dark dramatic stadium background with bright spotlights, golden football on left side, shiny FIFA World Cup trophy on right side, large gold metallic bold text FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 in center, white subtitle text THAM GIA THACH THUC DU DOAN below title, small rectangular bordered gold button with text DU DOAN VA THANG, 12BET logo in bottom-right corner, professional sports prediction website banner, dark navy background, cinematic lighting" -s 4K -a 4:1 -o banner-vi -d /tmp/generated-assets/ -r /Users/eason.chen/Documents/GitHub/wc-prediction/public/banners/banner-en.png)
Bash(python3 -c "import opencc; cc = opencc.OpenCC\('t2s'\); print\(cc.convert\('賽事預測'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'dist index.json has {len\(d\)} entries, last date: {d[-1][\\"date\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); finished=[m for m in d if m.get\('actualScoreHome'\) is not None]; print\(json.dumps\(finished[:10], indent=2\)\)")
